summary: Completed 6 phases with 32 total tasks across 2 waves (Session Memory + Evidence Enforcement)

decisions: Session sections stored in separate session-state.json (not state.json) for clean separation
Archive uses copy+remove fallback for cross-device moves
MCP schema uses enum constraints for section names and status values

Regex patterns include @ for scoped package path support
